title: Sterile Technique Idea
script_summary: This video explores the science behind sterile techniques, revealing what’s fact and what’s myth.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about sterile technique than social media does.
Sterile technique is essential in health care to prevent infection.
But did you know it's not just about keeping things clean? It’s about technique!
Studies show proper handwashing, using sterile tools, and effective barriers are key.
Misunderstanding can lead to infection. That’s why accuracy matters!
Want to learn more about health and science? Follow for more insights!
